---
id: search-agreements
title: "Search agreements with matched section previews"
description: "Searches agreements with the same structured filters as `/v1/sections`, including taxonomy IDs, and returns one row per agreement."
sidebar_label: "Search agreements with matched section previews"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/pandects/pandects-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Search agreements with matched section previews"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/search/agreements"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Searches agreements with the same structured filters as `/v1/sections`, including taxonomy IDs, and returns one row per agreement.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
